title: Fix admin delete permission check blocking admin users

requirements.summary: Fix the admin role check in the delete member flow so that authenticated admin users can successfully delete members without seeing the 'only admin can delete' error message
acceptanceCriteria: When logged in as an admin, clicking the delete member button does NOT show 'only admin can delete' or any unauthorized error message.
The delete confirmation dialog appears correctly for admin users.
Confirming deletion in the dialog successfully calls the backend deleteMember function and removes the member.
Non-admin users still see an appropriate access-denied message when attempting to delete.
The backend role check for deleteMember correctly validates admin principal/role before rejecting the request.

file_operations.description: Fix the admin role check in handleDeleteMember to properly await and verify the admin status before blocking the delete action. Ensure isCallerAdminQuery is fully loaded and has valid data before performing the check. Add proper error handling for backend authorization failures and display appropriate error messages to the user. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Review and fix the useIsCallerAdmin query hook to ensure it properly fetches and caches the admin status. Ensure the query is enabled only when the actor is available and authentication is complete. Add proper retry logic and error handling. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
